title: Return values from functions without side effects should not be ignored
description: Functions that do not have side effects should return a value, otherwise the returned value is ignored.
message: Function does not return a value.
recommendation: Always return a value from a function.

noncompliant.description: Function does not return a value.

why_is_this_an_issue: Ignoring the return value of a function can lead to unexpected behavior and make the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Always return a value from a function.

metadata.title: Return values from functions without side effects should not be ignored
